initial_candidates.sql:
WITH artist_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        ArtistId,
        COUNT(*) AS total_albums_sold
    FROM albums
    GROUP BY ArtistId
),
top_artist AS (
    SELECT ArtistId
    FROM artist_sales
    WHERE total_albums_sold = (SELECT MAX(total_albums_sold) FROM artist_sales)
    ORDER BY ArtistId
    LIMIT 1
),
bottom_artist AS (
    SELECT ArtistId
    FROM artist_sales
    WHERE total_albums_sold = (SELECT MIN(total_albums_sold) FROM artist_sales)
    ORDER BY ArtistId
    LIMIT 1
),
customer_spending AS (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerId,
        SUM(i.UnitPrice * i.Quantity) AS total_spent
    FROM customers c
    JOIN invoices i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
    JOIN invoice_items ii ON i.InvoiceId = ii.InvoiceId
    JOIN albums a ON ii.AlbumId = a.AlbumId
    WHERE a.ArtistId IN ((SELECT ArtistId FROM top_artist), (SELECT ArtistId FROM bottom_artist))
    GROUP BY c.CustomerId
),
top_artist_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        cs.CustomerId,
        cs.total_spent
    FROM customer_spending cs
    JOIN invoices i ON cs.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
    JOIN invoice_items ii ON i.InvoiceId = ii.InvoiceId
    JOIN albums a ON ii.AlbumId = a.AlbumId
    WHERE a.ArtistId = (SELECT ArtistId FROM top_artist)
),
bottom_artist_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        cs.CustomerId,
        cs.total_spent
    FROM customer_spending cs
    JOIN invoices i ON cs.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
    JOIN invoice_items ii ON i.InvoiceId = ii.InvoiceId
    JOIN albums a ON ii.AlbumId = a.AlbumId
    WHERE a.ArtistId = (SELECT ArtistId FROM bottom_artist)
),
top_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(total_spent) AS avg_top
    FROM top_artist_customers
),
bottom_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(total_spent) AS avg_bottom
    FROM bottom_artist_customers
)
SELECT ABS(COALESCE(t.avg_top, 0) - COALESCE(b.avg_bottom, 0))
FROM top_avg t, bottom_avg b;

WITH artist_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        ArtistId,
        COUNT(*) AS album_count
    FROM albums
    GROUP BY ArtistId
),
top_artist AS (
    SELECT ArtistId
    FROM artist_sales
    ORDER BY album_count DESC, ArtistId ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
bottom_artist AS (
    SELECT ArtistId
    FROM artist_sales
    ORDER BY album_count ASC, ArtistId ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    ABS(
        (SELECT AVG(album_count) FROM artist_sales WHERE ArtistId = (SELECT ArtistId FROM top_artist))
        -
        (SELECT AVG(album_count) FROM artist_sales WHERE ArtistId = (SELECT ArtistId FROM bottom_artist))
    ) AS abs_diff_avg_sales
FROM top_artist;

WITH artist_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        ArtistId,
        COUNT(*) AS album_count
    FROM albums
    GROUP BY ArtistId
),
top_bottom_artists AS (
    SELECT 
        ArtistId,
        album_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY album_count DESC, ArtistId ASC) AS top_rank,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY album_count ASC, ArtistId ASC) AS bottom_rank
    FROM artist_sales
),
top_artist AS (
    SELECT ArtistId AS top_artist_id
    FROM top_bottom_artists
    WHERE top_rank = 1
),
bottom_artist AS (
    SELECT ArtistId AS bottom_artist_id
    FROM top_bottom_artists
    WHERE bottom_rank = 1
),
top_albums AS (
    SELECT AlbumId
    FROM albums
    WHERE ArtistId = (SELECT top_artist_id FROM top_artist)
),
bottom_albums AS (
    SELECT AlbumId
    FROM albums
    WHERE ArtistId = (SELECT bottom_artist_id FROM bottom_artist)
),
top_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT il.CustomerId, SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS total_spent_top
    FROM invoice_items il
    JOIN top_albums ta ON il.AlbumId = ta.AlbumId
    GROUP BY il.CustomerId
),
bottom_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT il.CustomerId, SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS total_spent_bottom
    FROM invoice_items il
    JOIN bottom_albums ba ON il.AlbumId = ba.AlbumId
    GROUP BY il.CustomerId
),
top_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(total_spent_top) AS avg_top
    FROM top_customers
),
bottom_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(total_spent_bottom) AS avg_bottom
    FROM bottom_customers
)
SELECT ABS(t.avg_top - b.avg_bottom)
FROM top_avg t, bottom_avg b;

WITH artist_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        ArtistId,
        COUNT(*) AS album_count
    FROM albums
    GROUP BY ArtistId
),
top_artist AS (
    SELECT ArtistId
    FROM artist_sales
    ORDER BY album_count DESC, ArtistId ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
bottom_artist AS (
    SELECT ArtistId
    FROM artist_sales
    ORDER BY album_count ASC, ArtistId ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
top_albums AS (
    SELECT AlbumId
    FROM albums
    WHERE ArtistId = (SELECT ArtistId FROM top_artist)
),
bottom_albums AS (
    SELECT AlbumId
    FROM albums
    WHERE ArtistId = (SELECT ArtistId FROM bottom_artist)
),
customer_spending AS (
    SELECT 
        il.CustomerId,
        CASE 
            WHEN il.AlbumId IN (SELECT AlbumId FROM top_albums) THEN (SELECT ArtistId FROM top_artist)
            WHEN il.AlbumId IN (SELECT AlbumId FROM bottom_albums) THEN (SELECT ArtistId FROM bottom_artist)
        END AS ArtistId,
        SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS TotalSpent
    FROM invoice_items il
    WHERE il.AlbumId IN (SELECT AlbumId FROM top_albums) 
       OR il.AlbumId IN (SELECT AlbumId FROM bottom_albums)
    GROUP BY il.CustomerId, ArtistId
),
top_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(TotalSpent) AS avg_top
    FROM customer_spending
    WHERE ArtistId = (SELECT ArtistId FROM top_artist)
),
bottom_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(TotalSpent) AS avg_bottom
    FROM customer_spending
    WHERE ArtistId = (SELECT ArtistId FROM bottom_artist)
)
SELECT 
    ABS(COALESCE((SELECT avg_top FROM top_avg), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT avg_bottom FROM bottom_avg), 0)) AS difference
;

WITH artist_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        ArtistId,
        COUNT(*) AS album_count
    FROM albums
    GROUP BY ArtistId
),
top_artist AS (
    SELECT ArtistId
    FROM artist_sales
    ORDER BY album_count DESC, ArtistId ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
bottom_artist AS (
    SELECT ArtistId
    FROM artist_sales
    ORDER BY album_count ASC, ArtistId ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
top_albums AS (
    SELECT AlbumId
    FROM albums
    WHERE ArtistId = (SELECT ArtistId FROM top_artist)
),
bottom_albums AS (
    SELECT AlbumId
    FROM albums
    WHERE ArtistId = (SELECT ArtistId FROM bottom_artist)
),
customer_top_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        il.CustomerId,
        SUM(il.Quantity * il.UnitPrice) AS total_spent_top
    FROM invoice_lines il
    INNER JOIN top_albums ta ON il.AlbumId = ta.AlbumId
    GROUP BY il.CustomerId
),
customer_bottom_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        il.CustomerId,
        SUM(il.Quantity * il.UnitPrice) AS total_spent_bottom
    FROM invoice_lines il
    INNER JOIN bottom_albums ba ON il.AlbumId = ba.AlbumId
    GROUP BY il.CustomerId
),
top_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(total_spent_top) AS avg_top
    FROM customer_top_sales
),
bottom_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(total_spent_bottom) AS avg_bottom
    FROM customer_bottom_sales
)
SELECT 
    ABS(t.avg_top - b.avg_bottom) AS absolute_difference
FROM top_avg t, bottom_avg b;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH artist_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        ArtistId,
        COUNT(*) AS album_count
    FROM albums
    GROUP BY ArtistId
),
top_artist AS (
    SELECT ArtistId
    FROM artist_sales
    ORDER BY album_count DESC, ArtistId ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
bottom_artist AS (
    SELECT ArtistId
    FROM artist_sales
    ORDER BY album_count ASC, ArtistId ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    ABS(
        (SELECT AVG(album_count) FROM artist_sales WHERE ArtistId = (SELECT ArtistId FROM top_artist))
        -
        (SELECT AVG(album_count) FROM artist_sales WHERE ArtistId = (SELECT ArtistId FROM bottom_artist))
    ) AS abs_diff_avg_sales
FROM top_artist;
